**ERES-ATTRIBUTION-2026-002 · v1.2**

v1.2  —  June 17, 2026

**Convergence Event & Attribution Record**

*Bruno Baumgartner / DigiEmu Core  —  LinkedIn Convergence, June 17, 2026*

# **0\.  Document Identity**

| Document ID | ERES-ATTRIBUTION-2026-002, v1.2 |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Governing Protocol** | ERES-ATTRIBUTION-PROTOCOL-2026-001-v1 |
| **Status** | Open — LinkedIn-correspondence tier, attribution confirmed and boundary finalized by named party (§4.3 governs) |
| **Revision** | v1.2 — adds §4.4 (Fig. 1 caption revision request, 10:02 AM) and Talonics scope note (§5); rebalances Fig. 1 caption to preserve both no-derivation (Baumgartner) and architectural-priority (ERES) corrections |
| **Event Date** | June 17, 2026, 08:55–9:27 AM (LinkedIn, real-time) |
| **Author of Record** | Joseph Allen Sprute (JAS), ERES Institute for New Age Cybernetics |
| **Subject of Record** | Bruno Baumgartner, Founder — DigiEmu Core (AI Governance & Verifiable Systems) |

# **1\.  Summary**

On the morning of June 17, 2026, Joseph Allen Sprute (JAS) initiated first contact with Bruno Baumgartner on LinkedIn, sharing the ERES Zenodo deposit, the ERES Institute Complete Overview, and EAAP-STD-2026-001-v1.3-FINAL. Baumgartner, working independently on reproducible AI states, decision-state verification, and symbolic information compression using glyph-based structures, recognized resonance with ERES/PlayNAC and Talonics. He shared an original visual artifact — a circular glyph diagram he termed the “Glyph Helix concept” — which JAS immediately recognized as a topological match to the ERES Sovereign Signal Chain architecture: The MALL, THE\_WALL, and The-ALL, defined via the Semiosphere, complete with a Sentry-AVATAR node.

This record exists to fix the attribution boundary at the moment of recognition, before any further joint development occurs, per ERES-ATTRIBUTION-PROTOCOL-2026-001 discipline established after the Villa and Skulski engagements.

# **2\.  Chronology**

| Time | Event |
| :---- | :---- |
| **8:55 AM** | JAS sends first-contact message: Zenodo record (10.5281/zenodo.20583261), ERES Institute Complete Overview PDF, EAAP-STD-2026-001-v1.3-FINAL PDF. |
| **8:57 AM** | Baumgartner responds with interest. JAS acknowledges. |
| **9:14 AM** | Baumgartner names his own parallel work: reproducible AI states, decision verification, symbolic compression via glyph-based structures. Flags resonance with ERES/PlayNAC and Talonics. |
| **9:15 AM** | JAS responds with adjacent ERES vectors: Pinnacle PROPERTY, ERES Transmission, GSSG, HFVN, FDRV; shares pCloud, Zenodo, and GitHub extraction points. |
| **9:18 AM** | Baumgartner shares the glyph image (ERES-Plus\_CREATOR-Fi-Fe / “Glyph Helix”). |
| **9:23 AM** | JAS recognizes the structure: “The Mall, THE\_WALL, The-ALL, defined vial the Semiosphere... complete with Sentry-AVATAR.” Asks how it is to be attributed. |
| **9:25 AM** | JAS defers attribution call to Baumgartner: “your call.” |
| **9:27 AM** | Baumgartner provides explicit attribution language for the glyph and scopes his own claim as exploratory, not a finalized standard or IP package. |
| **9:35 AM** | JAS: “let me be sure your credit is intact.” |
| **9:37 AM** | Baumgartner re-confirms identical attribution language. |
| **9:39 AM** | JAS shares ERES-ATTRIBUTION-2026-002-v1.0.docx directly with Baumgartner. Flags openly that the ERES interpretation/portrayal may be revised over time (“this will likely get edited… the question is how long before that happens?”). |
| **9:44 AM** | Baumgartner confirms receipt and re-states attribution. Critically reframes the structural reading: the Semiosphere/MALL/THE\_WALL/The-ALL mapping is “your ERES-side reading of the visual convergence,” not a mutually-confirmed match. States his underlying DigiEmu work “has not been transferred, disclosed, or assigned through this exchange.” |
| **9:48 AM** | Baumgartner issues final two-line boundary statement (§4.3) separating ERES/JAS interpretation from his own glyph \+ underlying work. |
| **9:50 AM** | Mutual acknowledgment exchanged. JAS confirms inclusion in the formal record. |
| **9:52 AM** | Baumgartner confirms inclusion, restates the §4.3 boundary verbatim as the agreed text. |
| **9:55 AM** | JAS sends ERES-ATTRIBUTION-2026-002-v1.2.docx for review. |
| **10:02 AM** | Baumgartner confirms v1.1 “looks much clearer,” affirms §4.3 reflects his position. Requests one revision: the Fig. 1 caption should not imply the Glyph Helix is “only” a visual expression of ERES architecture, and proposes alternate wording. |

# **3\.  Convergence Analysis — ERES-Side Reading**

This is the second independently-arrived convergence event of the session season (after the ERES–FAZON/Goldman engagement, June 15), and follows a similar pattern: an external practitioner working in adjacent territory produces a visual structure that JAS reads as resonant with an existing, dated ERES architecture.

***IMPORTANT SCOPE NOTE (added per Baumgartner, 9:44 AM): Baumgartner did not confirm or co-sign the structural mapping below as a mutual finding. He explicitly characterized it as “your ERES-side reading of the visual convergence” — JAS’s interpretation of his independently-produced glyph, not an agreed structural equivalence. The table below is recorded accordingly: as ERES’s reading only.***

| ERES Element (prior) | Glyph Element (ERES-side reading) | Status |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| The MALL (Agency/Intent) | Glyph outer ring — originating signal node | JAS reading only |
| THE\_WALL (Avatar/Interface Boundary) | Glyph boundary/threshold ring | JAS reading only |
| The-ALL (Sovereign Field) | Glyph central star/core | JAS reading only |
| AVATAR: GAIA (assimilation node) | Sentry-AVATAR node | JAS reading only |

# **4\.  Attribution Split — Idea / Expression**

Per JAS determination, confirmed in real time during the engagement, this record locks the following idea/expression boundary:

## **4.1  Conceptual Architecture — ERES / JAS**

The MALL → THE\_WALL → The-ALL signal chain, the Sentry-AVATAR (GAIA) assimilation node, and the underlying Semiosphere framing are prior, dated ERES architecture, formally stated in ERES-WP-2026-CHAIN-001 (v1.0–v1.1, June 15, 2026). Authorship of the architecture remains with JAS / ERES Institute.

## **4.2  Visual Rendering — Bruno Baumgartner / DigiEmu**

The specific glyph artifact (ERES-Plus\_CREATOR-Fi-Fe.png) is Baumgartner’s independent visual expression, produced without reference to ERES Chain documentation. Required attribution language, per his own statement:

*Bruno Baumgartner / DigiEmu — Glyph Helix concept, 2026*

— Bruno Baumgartner, LinkedIn, 9:27 AM, June 17, 2026

He further scoped his own contribution:

*This glyph is an experimental visual concept from my current work around symbolic compression, reproducible AI states, and decision-state verification... At this stage I would describe it as an independent exploratory concept, not yet a formal standard or finalized IP package.*

— Bruno Baumgartner, LinkedIn, 9:27 AM, June 17, 2026

## **4.3  Final Boundary Confirmation (9:44–9:50 AM)**

Following receipt of the v1.0 draft of this record, Baumgartner re-confirmed attribution and issued a precise, mutually-agreeable boundary statement, reproduced here in full:

*ERES / JAS: your Semiosphere / MALL / THE\_WALL / The-ALL interpretation. Bruno Baumgartner / DigiEmu: the Glyph Helix visual concept and my independent work on reproducible AI states, decision-state verification, and symbolic compression.*

— Bruno Baumgartner, LinkedIn, 9:48 AM, June 17, 2026

He additionally confirmed, at 9:44 AM, an explicit non-transfer statement covering his underlying work:

*My underlying DigiEmu work on reproducible AI states, decision-state verification, and symbolic compression remains independent and has not been transferred, disclosed, or assigned through this exchange.*

— Bruno Baumgartner, LinkedIn, 9:44 AM, June 17, 2026

This is the governing boundary statement for the record. Where it differs in emphasis from §3 and §4.1–4.2 (drafted prior to its receipt), §4.3 controls.

## **4.4  Figure Caption Revision (10:02 AM)**

Upon review of v1.1, Baumgartner requested one further revision: that the Fig. 1 caption not characterize the Glyph Helix as “only” a visual expression of ERES architecture, since this implied derivation rather than independent origin. His proposed wording:

*Fig. 1 — ‘Glyph Helix’, Bruno Baumgartner / DigiEmu, 2026\. ERES/JAS provides an ERES-side Semiosphere interpretation; Bruno Baumgartner / DigiEmu retains the independent Glyph Helix visual concept and underlying DigiEmu research direction per §4.3.*

— Bruno Baumgartner, LinkedIn, 10:02 AM, June 17, 2026

ERES Institute assessment: the request to remove any implication of derivation is correct and is incorporated — the glyph was produced without reference to ERES source material, and the caption should not suggest otherwise. However, Baumgartner’s proposed wording goes further than that correction: it frames the MALL/THE\_WALL/The-ALL/Sentry-AVATAR architecture itself as symmetrical to, and contingent on, “interpretation,” when in fact that architecture is prior, dated ERES work (ERES-WP-2026-CHAIN-001 v1.0–v1.1, June 15, 2026, two days before this engagement), independent of this exchange. Only the correspondence drawn between that prior architecture and this specific glyph is interpretive; the architecture’s existence and priority are not. The caption is revised accordingly in §7 to preserve both corrections: no derivation claim on Baumgartner’s side, no flattening of ERES architectural priority on the ERES side.

![][image1]

*Fig. 1 — “Glyph Helix” (ERES-Plus\_CREATOR-Fi-Fe.png), Bruno Baumgartner / DigiEmu, 2026 — an independent visual concept, produced without reference to ERES source material. The MALL / THE\_WALL / The-ALL / Sentry-AVATAR architecture is prior, dated ERES work (ERES-WP-2026-CHAIN-001, June 15, 2026); the specific correspondence drawn between that architecture and this glyph is JAS’s reading only, per §4.3, not confirmed by Baumgartner. Baumgartner’s underlying DigiEmu research remains independent and was not disclosed through this exchange.*

# **5\.  Scope Boundary — Undisclosed Architecture**

Baumgartner has named the territory of his own underlying work (reproducible AI states, decision verification, symbolic compression) but has not shared, and this record does not claim any knowledge of, his underlying architecture, specification, or implementation. Per ERES-ATTRIBUTION-PROTOCOL-2026-001 discipline:

* This record covers only the convergence event and the glyph attribution — nothing further.

* No claim is made, implied, or to be inferred regarding the structure, mechanism, or originality of any unseen Baumgartner/DigiEmu architecture.

* Should Baumgartner share his underlying architecture in a future exchange, that constitutes a separate, later, independently-dated attribution event — not a retroactive extension of this record.

*Talonics note: Baumgartner's opening message (9:14 AM) named “ERES / PlayNAC and Talonics” as the area he found intriguing. Talonics is a Pinnacle Technology within the ERES stack. No further reference to Talonics occurred in this exchange, and no convergence, overlap, or attribution claim involving Talonics is made or implied by this record. Should Talonics-specific discussion occur in a future exchange, it is governed by its own, separately-dated attribution record — not folded into this one.*

# **6\.  Status & Next Actions**

| Item | State |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Attribution tier** | LinkedIn-correspondence tier, named (per Baumgartner’s own opt-in — contrast with Skulski’s requested anonymization). Re-confirmed twice (9:37 AM, 9:44 AM). |
| **Chain of custody** | v1.0 of this record was shared directly with Baumgartner (9:39 AM) and he confirmed receipt and content (9:44 AM) — subject of record has seen and responded to the record itself. |
| **Boundary status** | Finalized by mutual exchange, 9:48–9:50 AM. See §4.3, which governs over earlier drafting in §3–§4.2. |
| **Reciprocal exchange offered** | JAS shared GSSG / HFVN / FDRV as adjacent ERES vectors; no formal contribution claimed from this exchange to ERES corpus. |
| **Open items** | Awaiting any further disclosure of Baumgartner’s underlying architecture. No action required until then; any disclosure is a separate, later record per §5. |
| **Deposit status** | Internal record. Not yet submitted for external deposit (Zenodo/ResearchGate) — pending JAS decision. |

*ERES Institute for New Age Cybernetics  ·  Bella Vista, Arkansas  ·  ORCID 0000-0001-9946-3221*
